# artifacts

Governs the .digital-artifacts folder structure, template scaffolding, inventory maintenance, LATEST.md updates, and role-based artifact access.

## Purpose

- Provide the capabilities documented in `SKILL.md`.

## Usage

- Use this skill via the agile-coach prompt entrypoints governed in `SKILL.md`:
  - `/artifacts-testdata-2-input`
  - `/artifacts-input-2-data`
  - `/artifacts-data-2-specification`
  - `/artifacts-specification-2-stage stage="<stage>"`
  - `/artifacts-specification-2-planning stage="<stage>"`

## Scripts

- Prompt scripts are centralized under `scripts/` in this skill.
- See `SKILL.md` for the authoritative contract and transition details.
